mapper.select: SELECT * FROM weight_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
SELECT * FROM weight_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weight_record (user_id, record_date, weight_kg, bmi, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordDate}, #{weightKg}, #{bmi}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE weight_record SET weight_kg = #{weightKg}, bmi = #{bmi}, note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
